title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr James Wall
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Mr James Wall  Teacher reference number: 3557513  Teacher’s date of birth: 29 March 1990  Location teacher worked: Herefordshire, West Midlands  Date of professional conduct panel: 13 August 2025 to 15 August 2025, 18 August 2025, 20 October 2025 and 18 November 2025.  Outcome type: Prohibition order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Mr James Wall formerly employed in Herefordshire, West Midlands.   Teacher misconduct   Ground Floor, South Cheylesmore House 5 Quinton RoadCoventryCV1 2WT     Email TRA.Casework@education.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7593 5393    Information about regulating the teaching profession and the process for dealing with serious teacher misconduct.   "
